# Yalcincan Ulus

> Full-stack web developer based in Turkey.

This is the personal portfolio of Yalcincan Ulus, a full-stack web developer with experience building TypeScript-based web applications using modern frameworks and tools.

## Featured Projects

- [Social Media Platform](https://github.com/veotaar/social): Full-stack social media app built as a Turborepo monorepo with a Bun backend and React frontend. Features image uploads (MinIO S3), real-time WebSocket notifications, cursor-based feeds, and authentication via Better Auth.

- [Messaging App](https://github.com/veotaar/messaging-app-api): Real-time messaging application with JWT auth, friend system, and live WebSocket chat (Socket.IO). Built with Node.js/Express (migrated to Bun), React, MongoDB, and TanStack Router.

- [Blog Platform](https://github.com/veotaar/blog-api): Blog platform with a REST API, public-facing blog, and an admin CMS across three separate apps. Features JWT + RBAC, CI/CD with Docker and GitHub Actions.

## Other Projects

- [Multiplayer Location Guessing Game](https://github.com/veotaar/guess-the-country-prototype): Multiplayer geography guessing game played through a Discord bot. Over 1,400 games and 27,000+ guesses played. Uses MongoDB and D3.js.

- [GeoGuessr Account Status Checker](https://github.com/veotaar/geo-polis): Discord bot that monitors GeoGuessr accounts for ban status using BullMQ, SQLite, and Hono.

## Contact & Links
